---
title: "weighted"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-22"
---

```{r loading packages, warning=FALSE, results='hide', message=FALSE}
library("formatR")
library("foreign")
library("ggplot2")
library("lme4")
library("poLCA")
library("reprex")
library("tidyr")
library("klippy")
library("dplyr")
library("haven")
library("psych")
library("Matrix")
library("lme4")
library("merTools")
library("sjPlot")
library("glmmTMB")
library("foreign")
library("gt")
library("tibble")
library("dplyr")
```

```{r loading data, cache=TRUE, results='hide', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

NEA2022 <- readRDS("data/processed/LCAfinal.rds")

attach(NEA2022)
set.seed(123)
```


```{r transform in factor, cache=TRUE}
#Transform in factor
NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(
    migration = trimws(migration),
    education = trimws(education),
    gender = trimws(gender),
    leeftijd = trimws(leeftijd)
  )

NEA2022$gender <- factor(NEA2022$gender, levels = c("m", "v"))
NEA2022$migration <- factor(NEA2022$migration,
                            levels = c("nl", "eu", "noeu"))
NEA2022$education <- factor(NEA2022$education,
                            levels = c("laag", "middel", "hoog"))
NEA2022$leeftijd <- factor(NEA2022$leeftijd,
                            levels = c("15.35", "35.55", "55.75"))
```

# overall unsafe weighted

```{r}

NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(model7_6 = pmodel7_empv6 * 100)

L_6w_1 <- glmmTMB(
  model7_6 ~ gender_v + migration_eu + migration_noeu +
    education_laag + education_middel +
    leeftijd_35.55 + leeftijd_55.75 +
    (1 | intersections),
  data = NEA2022,
  weights = weegpo_1
)
tab_model(L_6w_1, p.style="stars")
```


```{r estimated overall unsafety Model1, cache=TRUE}
#Model1: Predicted probability belonging to overall unsafety class

NEA2022$predicted_6 <- predict(L_6w_1, re.form = NULL, type = "response")

NEA2022$residual_6 <- NEA2022$model7_6 - NEA2022$predicted_6

summary_preds_6 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_6 = mean(predicted_6, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pred_6 = sd(residual_6, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

ggplot(summary_preds_6, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_pred_6, color = gender)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_pred_6 - se_pred_6,
                    ymax = mean_pred_6 + se_pred_6),
                width = 0,
                alpha = 0.4,
                linewidth = 0.005
                ) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(education), cols = vars(migration),
             labeller = labeller(
               education = education_labels,
               migration = migration_labels
             ),
             switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability overall unsafety Model1",
    y = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
                     labels = gender_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = NULL,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability")
  )
```

```{r estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety, cache=TRUE}
#Estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety

# Random intercepts per intersection
re_df <- ranef(L_6w_1)$cond$intersections %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("intersection") %>%
  rename(estimate = `(Intercept)`)

set.seed(123)

n_boot <- 200  # aantal bootstraps (meer = stabieler)

boot_estimates <- replicate(n_boot, {
  # Trek bootstrap steekproef met vervanging
  boot_data <- NEA2022[sample(1:nrow(NEA2022), replace = TRUE), ]
  
  # Fit model opnieuw (met dezelfde formule)
  boot_model <- update(L_6w_1, data = boot_data)
  
  # Extract random intercepts
  re_boot <- ranef(boot_model)$cond$intersections[, 1]
  re_boot
})


# Zet om naar data.frame met zelfde volgorde als re_df
boot_df <- as.data.frame(t(boot_estimates))
colnames(boot_df) <- rownames(ranef(L_6w_1)$cond$intersections)

# Bereken standaarddeviatie (SE) en CI's
ci_df <- data.frame(
  intersection = colnames(boot_df),
  se = apply(boot_df, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
  lower = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
  upper = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Combineer met originele estimates
re_df <- re_df %>%
  left_join(ci_df, by = "intersection") %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      upper < 0 ~ "Advantaged",
      lower > 0 ~ "Disadvantaged",
      TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
    )
  )


re_df <- re_df %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

re_df$color <- case_when(
  re_df$significance == "Advantaged" ~ "steelblue",
  re_df$significance == "Disadvantaged" ~ "tomato",
  TRUE ~ "gray50"
)

re_df

ggplot(re_df, aes(x = rank, y = estimate, color = color)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Intersections (ranked)",
    y = "Random effect estimate",
    title = "Estimated intersectional effects (glmmTMB)",
    subtitle = "With 95% bootstrap confidence intervals"
  )


```




# Overall unsafety unweighted

```{r}

NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(model7_6 = pmodel7_empv6 * 100)

L_6g_1 <- glmmTMB(
  model7_6 ~ gender_v + migration_eu + migration_noeu +
    education_laag + education_middel +
    leeftijd_35.55 + leeftijd_55.75 +
    (1 | intersections),
  data = NEA2022
)
tab_model(L_6g_1, p.style="stars")
```



```{r estimated overall unsafety Model1, cache=TRUE}
#Model1: Predicted probability belonging to overall unsafety class

NEA2022$predicted_6 <- predict(L_6g_1, re.form = NULL, type = "response")

NEA2022$residual_6 <- NEA2022$model7_6 - NEA2022$predicted_6

summary_preds_6 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_6 = mean(predicted_6, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pred_6 = sd(residual_6, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

ggplot(summary_preds_6, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_pred_6, color = gender)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_pred_6 - se_pred_6,
                    ymax = mean_pred_6 + se_pred_6),
                width = 0,
                alpha = 0.4,
                linewidth = 0.005
                ) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(education), cols = vars(migration),
             labeller = labeller(
               education = education_labels,
               migration = migration_labels
             ),
             switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability overall unsafety Model1",
    y = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
                     labels = gender_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = NULL,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability")
  )
```

```{r estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety, cache=TRUE}
#Estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety

# Random intercepts per intersection
re_df <- ranef(L_6g_1)$cond$intersections %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("intersection") %>%
  rename(estimate = `(Intercept)`)

set.seed(123)

n_boot <- 200  # aantal bootstraps (meer = stabieler)

boot_estimates <- replicate(n_boot, {
  # Trek bootstrap steekproef met vervanging
  boot_data <- NEA2022[sample(1:nrow(NEA2022), replace = TRUE), ]
  
  # Fit model opnieuw (met dezelfde formule)
  boot_model <- update(L_6g_1, data = boot_data)
  
  # Extract random intercepts
  re_boot <- ranef(boot_model)$cond$intersections[, 1]
  re_boot
})


# Zet om naar data.frame met zelfde volgorde als re_df
boot_df <- as.data.frame(t(boot_estimates))
colnames(boot_df) <- rownames(ranef(L_6g_1)$cond$intersections)

# Bereken standaarddeviatie (SE) en CI's
ci_df <- data.frame(
  intersection = colnames(boot_df),
  se = apply(boot_df, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
  lower = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
  upper = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Combineer met originele estimates
re_df <- re_df %>%
  left_join(ci_df, by = "intersection") %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      upper < 0 ~ "Advantaged",
      lower > 0 ~ "Disadvantaged",
      TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
    )
  )


re_df <- re_df %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

re_df$color <- case_when(
  re_df$significance == "Advantaged" ~ "steelblue",
  re_df$significance == "Disadvantaged" ~ "tomato",
  TRUE ~ "gray50"
)

re_df

ggplot(re_df, aes(x = rank, y = estimate, color = color)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Intersections (ranked)",
    y = "Random effect estimate",
    title = "Estimated intersectional effects (glmmTMB)",
    subtitle = "With 95% bootstrap confidence intervals"
  )


```


```{r}
L_6_1_ml <- update(L_6_1, REML = FALSE)
summary(L_6_1_ml)
```


```{r estimated overall unsafety Model1, cache=TRUE}
#Model1: Predicted probability belonging to overall unsafety class

NEA2022$predicted_6 <- predict(L_6_1_ml, re.form = NULL, type = "response")

NEA2022$residual_6 <- NEA2022$model7_6 - NEA2022$predicted_6

summary_preds_6 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_6 = mean(predicted_6, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pred_6 = sd(residual_6, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

ggplot(summary_preds_6, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_pred_6, color = gender)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_pred_6 - se_pred_6,
                    ymax = mean_pred_6 + se_pred_6),
                width = 0,
                alpha = 0.4,
                linewidth = 0.005
                ) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(education), cols = vars(migration),
             labeller = labeller(
               education = education_labels,
               migration = migration_labels
             ),
             switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability overall unsafety Model1",
    y = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
                     labels = gender_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = NULL,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability")
  )
```



```{r estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety, cache=TRUE}
#Estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety

re <- ranef(L_6_1_ml, condVar = TRUE)$intersections

re_with_var <- ranef(L_6_1_ml, condVar = TRUE)

post_var <- attr(re_with_var$intersections, "postVar")

se <- sqrt(post_var[1, 1, ])

re_df <- data.frame(
  intersection = rownames(re),
  estimate = re[,1],
  se = se
)


re_df <- re_df %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se,
    significance = case_when(
      upper < 0 ~ "Advantaged",
      lower > 0 ~ "Disadvantaged",
      TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
    )
  )


re_df %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Estimated intersectional effect overall unsafety"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(estimate, se, lower, upper),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#009E73"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = significance,
      rows = significance == "Advantaged"
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "tomato"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = significance,
      rows = significance == "Disadvantaged"
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "gray"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = significance,
      rows = significance == "Not Significant"
    )
  )



re_df <- re_df %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

re_df$color <- case_when(
  re_df$significance == "Advantaged" ~ "steelblue",
  re_df$significance == "Disadvantaged" ~ "tomato",
  TRUE ~ "black"
)

ggplot(re_df, aes(x = rank, y = estimate, color = color)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    x = "Rank",
    y = "Intersectional Effects"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```






# supervisor unsafety

```{r}

NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(model7_4 = pmodel7_empv4 * 100)

L_4w_1 <- glmmTMB(
  model7_4 ~ gender_v + migration_eu + migration_noeu +
    education_laag + education_middel +
    leeftijd_35.55 + leeftijd_55.75 +
    (1 | intersections),
  data = NEA2022,
  weights = weegpo_1
)
tab_model(L_4w_1, p.style="stars")
```


```{r estimated overall unsafety Model1, cache=TRUE}
#Model1: Predicted probability belonging to overall unsafety class

NEA2022$predicted_4 <- predict(L_4w_1, re.form = NULL, type = "response")

NEA2022$residual_4 <- NEA2022$model7_4 - NEA2022$predicted_4

summary_preds_4 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_4 = mean(predicted_4, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pred_4 = sd(residual_4, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

ggplot(summary_preds_4, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_pred_4, color = gender)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_pred_4 - se_pred_4,
                    ymax = mean_pred_4 + se_pred_4),
                width = 0,
                alpha = 0.4,
                linewidth = 0.005
                ) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(education), cols = vars(migration),
             labeller = labeller(
               education = education_labels,
               migration = migration_labels
             ),
             switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability overall unsafety Model1",
    y = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
                     labels = gender_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = NULL,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability")
  )
```

```{r estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety, cache=TRUE}
#Estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety

# Random intercepts per intersection
re_df <- ranef(L_4w_1)$cond$intersections %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("intersection") %>%
  rename(estimate = `(Intercept)`)

set.seed(123)

n_boot <- 200  # aantal bootstraps (meer = stabieler)

boot_estimates <- replicate(n_boot, {
  # Trek bootstrap steekproef met vervanging
  boot_data <- NEA2022[sample(1:nrow(NEA2022), replace = TRUE), ]
  
  # Fit model opnieuw (met dezelfde formule)
  boot_model <- update(L_4w_1, data = boot_data)
  
  # Extract random intercepts
  re_boot <- ranef(boot_model)$cond$intersections[, 1]
  re_boot
})


# Zet om naar data.frame met zelfde volgorde als re_df
boot_df <- as.data.frame(t(boot_estimates))
colnames(boot_df) <- rownames(ranef(L_4w_1)$cond$intersections)

# Bereken standaarddeviatie (SE) en CI's
ci_df <- data.frame(
  intersection = colnames(boot_df),
  se = apply(boot_df, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
  lower = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
  upper = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Combineer met originele estimates
re_df <- re_df %>%
  left_join(ci_df, by = "intersection") %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      upper < 0 ~ "Advantaged",
      lower > 0 ~ "Disadvantaged",
      TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
    )
  )


re_df <- re_df %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

re_df$color <- case_when(
  re_df$significance == "Advantaged" ~ "steelblue",
  re_df$significance == "Disadvantaged" ~ "tomato",
  TRUE ~ "gray50"
)

re_df

ggplot(re_df, aes(x = rank, y = estimate, color = color)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Intersections (ranked)",
    y = "Random effect estimate",
    title = "Estimated intersectional effects (glmmTMB)",
    subtitle = "With 95% bootstrap confidence intervals"
  )

```




# unsafe social climate

```{r}

NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(model7_5 = pmodel7_empv5 * 100)

L_5w_1 <- glmmTMB(
  model7_5 ~ gender_v + migration_eu + migration_noeu +
    education_laag + education_middel +
    leeftijd_35.55 + leeftijd_55.75 +
    (1 | intersections),
  data = NEA2022,
  weights = weegpo_1
)
tab_model(L_5w_1, p.style="stars")
```


```{r estimated overall unsafety Model1, cache=TRUE}
#Model1: Predicted probability belonging to overall unsafety class

NEA2022$predicted_5 <- predict(L_5w_1, re.form = NULL, type = "response")

NEA2022$residual_5 <- NEA2022$model7_5 - NEA2022$predicted_5

summary_preds_5 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_5 = mean(predicted_5, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pred_5 = sd(residual_5, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

ggplot(summary_preds_5, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_pred_5, color = gender)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_pred_5 - se_pred_5,
                    ymax = mean_pred_5 + se_pred_5),
                width = 0,
                alpha = 0.4,
                linewidth = 0.005
                ) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(education), cols = vars(migration),
             labeller = labeller(
               education = education_labels,
               migration = migration_labels
             ),
             switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability overall unsafety Model1",
    y = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
                     labels = gender_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = NULL,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability")
  )
```

```{r estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety, cache=TRUE}
#Estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety

# Random intercepts per intersection
re_df <- ranef(L_5w_1)$cond$intersections %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("intersection") %>%
  rename(estimate = `(Intercept)`)

set.seed(123)

n_boot <- 200  # aantal bootstraps (meer = stabieler)

boot_estimates <- replicate(n_boot, {
  # Trek bootstrap steekproef met vervanging
  boot_data <- NEA2022[sample(1:nrow(NEA2022), replace = TRUE), ]
  
  # Fit model opnieuw (met dezelfde formule)
  boot_model <- update(L_5w_1, data = boot_data)
  
  # Extract random intercepts
  re_boot <- ranef(boot_model)$cond$intersections[, 1]
  re_boot
})


# Zet om naar data.frame met zelfde volgorde als re_df
boot_df <- as.data.frame(t(boot_estimates))
colnames(boot_df) <- rownames(ranef(L_5w_1)$cond$intersections)

# Bereken standaarddeviatie (SE) en CI's
ci_df <- data.frame(
  intersection = colnames(boot_df),
  se = apply(boot_df, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
  lower = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
  upper = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Combineer met originele estimates
re_df <- re_df %>%
  left_join(ci_df, by = "intersection") %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      upper < 0 ~ "Advantaged",
      lower > 0 ~ "Disadvantaged",
      TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
    )
  )


re_df <- re_df %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

re_df$color <- case_when(
  re_df$significance == "Advantaged" ~ "steelblue",
  re_df$significance == "Disadvantaged" ~ "tomato",
  TRUE ~ "gray50"
)

re_df

ggplot(re_df, aes(x = rank, y = estimate, color = color)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Intersections (ranked)",
    y = "Random effect estimate",
    title = "Estimated intersectional effects (glmmTMB)",
    subtitle = "With 95% bootstrap confidence intervals"
  )

```


#Short-term conflict 


```{r}

NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(model7_1 = pmodel7_empv1 * 100)

L_1w_1 <- glmmTMB(
  model7_1 ~ gender_v + migration_eu + migration_noeu +
    education_laag + education_middel +
    leeftijd_35.55 + leeftijd_55.75 +
    (1 | intersections),
  data = NEA2022,
  weights = weegpo_1
)
tab_model(L_5w_1, p.style="stars")
```


```{r estimated overall unsafety Model1, cache=TRUE}
#Model1: Predicted probability belonging to overall unsafety class

NEA2022$predicted_1 <- predict(L_1w_1, re.form = NULL, type = "response")

NEA2022$residual_1 <- NEA2022$model7_1 - NEA2022$predicted_1

summary_preds_1 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_1 = mean(predicted_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pred_1 = sd(residual_1, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

ggplot(summary_preds_1, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_pred_1, color = gender)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_pred_1 - se_pred_1,
                    ymax = mean_pred_1 + se_pred_1),
                width = 0,
                alpha = 0.4,
                linewidth = 0.005
                ) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(education), cols = vars(migration),
             labeller = labeller(
               education = education_labels,
               migration = migration_labels
             ),
             switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability overall unsafety Model1",
    y = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
                     labels = gender_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = NULL,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability")
  )
```

```{r estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety, cache=TRUE}
#Estimated intersectional effects overall unsafety

# Random intercepts per intersection
re_df <- ranef(L_1w_1)$cond$intersections %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("intersection") %>%
  rename(estimate = `(Intercept)`)

set.seed(123)

n_boot <- 200  # aantal bootstraps (meer = stabieler)

boot_estimates <- replicate(n_boot, {
  # Trek bootstrap steekproef met vervanging
  boot_data <- NEA2022[sample(1:nrow(NEA2022), replace = TRUE), ]
  
  # Fit model opnieuw (met dezelfde formule)
  boot_model <- update(L_1w_1, data = boot_data)
  
  # Extract random intercepts
  re_boot <- ranef(boot_model)$cond$intersections[, 1]
  re_boot
})


# Zet om naar data.frame met zelfde volgorde als re_df
boot_df <- as.data.frame(t(boot_estimates))
colnames(boot_df) <- rownames(ranef(L_1w_1)$cond$intersections)

# Bereken standaarddeviatie (SE) en CI's
ci_df <- data.frame(
  intersection = colnames(boot_df),
  se = apply(boot_df, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
  lower = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
  upper = apply(boot_df, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Combineer met originele estimates
re_df <- re_df %>%
  left_join(ci_df, by = "intersection") %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      upper < 0 ~ "Advantaged",
      lower > 0 ~ "Disadvantaged",
      TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
    )
  )


re_df <- re_df %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

re_df$color <- case_when(
  re_df$significance == "Advantaged" ~ "steelblue",
  re_df$significance == "Disadvantaged" ~ "tomato",
  TRUE ~ "gray50"
)

re_df

ggplot(re_df, aes(x = rank, y = estimate, color = color)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Intersections (ranked)",
    y = "Random effect estimate",
    title = "Estimated intersectional effects (glmmTMB)",
    subtitle = "With 95% bootstrap confidence intervals"
  )

```





```{r}
VarCorr(L_6_1)$intersections
```

```{r}
VarCorr(L_6g_1)$cond$intersections
```

```{r}
hist(ranef(L_6_1)$intersections[,1])
hist(ranef(L_6g_1)$cond$intersections[,1])

```



```{r}
summary(NEA2022$model7_6)

summary(NEA2022$model7_4)

summary(NEA2022$model7_7)

summary(NEA2022$model7_5)

summary(NEA2022$model7_1)

summary(NEA2022$model7_4)

summary(NEA2022$model7_2)

summary(NEA2022$model7_3)


```
